name: flow-attempt-cap-to-dead
description: Tier 2: with max_attempts=2, two clean failed entries stay within the cap (complete_failed clears the lease so the next entry can proceed immediately). The third entry exceeds the cap: the flow is marked dead and refused with KEEL-E032. A dead flow is never auto-resumed, so a fourth entry stays refused with KEEL-E032 too. Stubs skip tier-2 scenarios; the real core runs this in crates/keel-core/tests/flows_conformance.rs.
